text: Moon and Selkie fell in love beneath the violet light of the lunar sea.

name: Moon
text: If the tide takes me first, keep flying.

name: Selkie
text: Only if you promise to keep chasing me.
Their promise survived the catastrophe. Their courage did not survive it unchanged.
Flowers of impossible light spread over the sea, and every wish left a thorn.

name: Moon
text: I named my ship Sunset because it carries every ending I could not accept.

name: Selkie
text: Then Sunrise will be the answer. I will bring you back from the dark.
Sunset chased Sunrise; Sunrise circled back for Sunset. Each called it protection.
Five girls guard the long road between them: Mira, Shalmii, Aisha, Aster, and Caelia.
Across five moonlit regions, the chosen chaser must face every friend—and finally her lover.
